title: Bar and Bat Mitzvah: Coming of Age in Judaism
title_zh: 成人礼:犹太教的成年仪式——Bar和Bat Mitzvah
title_he: בר ובת מצווה: טקס ההבשלה ביהדות
author: Torah Light Project
key_concepts: Religious majority at age 13 for boys, 12-13 for girls
Cultural parallels to Chinese coming-of-age traditions
Distinction between ceremony and status change
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers with no background in Judaism
